job.title: Experienced Angular Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our front-end team in Avignon. You develop modern, high-performance user interfaces with Angular for various clients in an Agile environment.
mission.2: Design reusable components and UI libraries
mission.5: Perform unit and e2e testing (Jasmine, Cypress)
mission.6: Participate in code reviews and Agile ceremonies
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in software development
profile.3: Proficiency in Angular (v12+), TypeScript, and RxJS
profile.4: Knowledge of NgRx ou Akita is a plus
profile.5: UI/UX awareness and commitment to quality
